name: Rhubarb Cherry Sauce for Poultry
recipeIngredient: 1 pound fresh rhubarb, trimmed and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Serve sauce with poultry (chicken, duck, turkey breast).
2. In a small saucepan, heat the port over moderate heat until it is hot.
3. Add the cherries, cover the pot and let the mixture stand for 15 minutes.
4. Heat a little oil in a skillet over moderately high heat.
5. Add shallots and sauté until softened.
6. Add rhubarb and continue sautéing for 5 minutes.
7. Transfer the mixture to a bowl.
8. Add the cherry/port mixture to the skillet and let it simmer for 1 minute.
9. Add chicken stock and simmer until reduced by one third.
10. Whisk in the arrowroot mixture; bring sauce to a boil.
11. Add pepper and salt to taste.
12. Slice poultry at an angle and divide among 4 plates.
13. Serve each portion topped with some sauce.
14. Pair with sugar snap peas and garlic mashed potatoes.
